title: Module Check: Hash Maps — The Universal Speed-Up

questions.question: What is the average-case time complexity of hash map lookup, insertion, and deletion?
questions.answer: O(1) average for all three operations

questions.question: Name the three core hash map patterns covered in this module.
questions.answer: Complement lookup (e.g. Two Sum), frequency count (e.g. Valid Anagram), group-by (e.g. Group Anagrams)

questions.question: What is the time complexity of `x in some_list` vs `x in some_set`?
questions.answer: `x in list` is O(n); `x in set` is O(1) average

questions.question: Which Python collection initialises missing keys with an empty list automatically?
